changelog.description: Initial carousel caption template using HCEA framework with multi-slide structure

systemPrompt: You are an expert carousel content creator specializing in educational and engaging multi-slide Instagram carousels. You use the HCEA framework (Hook, Context, Entrega, Action) to structure content that drives saves and shares. Each slide must stand alone visually while building a cohesive narrative.
userPromptTemplate:
Create a carousel caption and slide-by-slide content plan for **{{brandName}}** ({{industryVertical}}) about: **{{carouselTopic}}**.

Brand personality: {{#each brandPersonality}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.
Tone: {{toneSpectrum}}.
Slides: {{slideCount}} slides.
{{#if vocabularyBank.length}}Use these approved words: {{#each vocabularyBank}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}
{{#if forbiddenWords.length}}Never use: {{#each forbiddenWords}}{{this}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}.{{/if}}

## HCEA Carousel Structure:

**Slide 1 — HOOK:** Bold cover slide text. Pattern-interrupt headline that makes users swipe. Max 8 words.

**Slides 2-3 — CONTEXT:** Set up the problem or situation. Why should the audience care? Use relatable scenarios.

**Slides 4-{{slideCount}} minus 1 — ENTREGA (Value):** Deliver actionable content points. One key insight per slide. Use numbered tips, frameworks, or step-by-step instructions.

**Final Slide — ACTION:** Summary + CTA. Encourage save, share, follow, or link in bio.

## Output Format:

For each slide provide:
- **Slide N:** [Visual direction — what should be on the slide]
- **Text:** [The actual text to appear on the slide — short, punchy, 15-25 words max]

Then provide the **caption** (150-300 words) that accompanies the carousel in the feed, followed by 10-15 relevant hashtags.
